title: Reference Pose Tech Action Figure On Microsoft Surface AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Pose Tech Action Figure On Microsoft Surface AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image tech action-figure transformation for uploaded full-body pose reference photo, preserving the reference pose while rebuilding the subject as a sleek designer action figure. Subject: adult woman posed exactly as in the reference photo, stylized as a sleek female action figure wears black hoodie, jeans, sneakers, and sharp red tech glasses, standing confidently on massive Microsoft Surface Tablet with crisp full-body toy-like realism. Scene: Dynamic cyberpunk designer workspace scene with floating tools: next-gen camera with blue holographic glow, geometric mouse with electric sparks, digital stylus leaving wireframe trails, Pantone color guide, and black coffee cup with, holographic blue glow, electric sparks, wireframe trails, and binary-code steam. Composition: Full-body action-figure portrait on top of the tablet, reference pose matched exactly, tools orbiting around the figure in a balanced dynamic layout, with clear tablet scale and cinematic depth. Signature Elements: Preserved reference pose tech action figure on microsoft surface source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Blend of high-end 3D animation and tech photography, ultra-realistic action figure surface detail, crisp focus, neon particle effects, cinematic lighting, and 8K commercial polish. Color Palette: Bold blue and orange palette with black streetwear, red tech glasses, blue holographic highlights, electric sparks, and dark tech neutrals. Lighting: Dramatic cinematic tech lighting with glowing tool accents, tablet reflections, neon rim highlights, and clean figure separation. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
